title: Support controlling dumpfile and dump enable via plusargs
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

What would you like added/supported?
Several other simulators provide a way to control the dumpfile name and enable status from the simulation-image commandline. To the best of my understanding, Verilator does not using the built-in simulation driver (ie --binary). I would like to have the ability to run something like:

```
% verilator --binary top.v --trace-fst
% ./obj_dir/Vtop +verilator.dumpfile=sim.fst +verilator.dumpvars
```

Is this already supported, and I've simply overlooked it? If not, is there openness to having such a feature?

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
Yes, I'm looking at the master version

Can you attach an example that runs on other simulators?  (Must be openly licensed, completely self-contained and self-checking so can directly run what you provide. Ideally use test_regress format, see https://veripool.org/guide/latest/contributing.html?highlight=test_regress#reporting-bugs

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
If there is openness to having this feature, I'm more than happy to contribute code.
